shellCommands.command: cd dst && mvn clean package -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -40
java -version 2>&1; echo "---"; javac -version 2>&1; echo "---"; mvn --version 2>&1 | head -5
cd dst && mvn clean package -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -20

SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar &>/tmp/spring.log & SPRING_PID=$!; sleep 8; echo "--- Testing GET / (no name) ---"; curl -s http://localhost:3000/; echo; echo "--- Testing GET /?name=Alice ---"; curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=Alice"; echo; echo "--- Testing GET /?name=%20%20Bob%20%20 (trimmed) ---"; curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20Bob%20%20"; echo; echo "--- Testing GET /?name=%20%20 (empty after trim) ---"; curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20"; echo; echo "--- Stopping server ---"; kill $SPRING_PID 2>/dev/null; wait $SPRING_PID 2>/dev/null; echo "Done"
